decisions_made: Wave protocol is the core execution model, not batch dispatch
Budget tracking is a first-class concern, not an afterthought
Night runner manages the wave loop with wall-clock enforcement
Coordinator handles multi-agent dispatch within waves
Crash recovery persists state so crashed sessions can resume
Model registry enables multi-model routing (Claude, Codex, Gemini)
Morning report is updated per-wave, not just at session end
Quality gates run automatically between waves
next_priorities: Deploy runtime to Mac via Tailscale
First real overnight session with full wave protocol
